title: Maliton Muslin Cloths for Baby, 6 Pack 70x70CM Large Cotton Burp Cloths, Soft & Breathable Baby Muslins Pack, Muslin Squares Baby Essentials for Newborn - Avocado & Lime Summer Fruit Set
features: 【Pack Information】Size: 70x70cm（27.5x27.5 inch), Contain 6 packs large burp cloths , 2 pieces of each pattern:Rainbow|Stars|Dots. Machine washable

【Natural material】Maliton muslin cloths for baby is made of 70% Viscose Derived from Bamboo and 30% Cotton, the organic baby towel is Soft, breathable and safe, gentle and harmless to baby's skin, it is the first choice for newborns.

【Versatile】this baby burp cloths help new parents take the brunt of spit-up and you can use these to wipe milk dribbles and drool.Also for face cloths, bite cloths, bibs or baby bath towels for bath time
【Convenient and Practical】They wash easily, dry quickly, can be tumble dried on low heat, and get softer with every wash,giving parents peace of mind.
【Ideal Baby Shower Gifts】 The baby muslin comes in a decent box which contains 6 pieces. And the painted pattern fit for baby girls and boys if you want to choose burp cloth as a baby shower gift.
